resources.name: Preserved Salmon
resources.description: Smoked and dried salmon. The foundation of the food economy. Essential for winter survival and potlatch feasting.

resources.name: Preserved Halibut
resources.description: Dried halibut. A high-value food requiring deep-water fishing skill. Prized as a trade good and feast component.

resources.name: Eulachon Oil
resources.description: Rendered oil from the eulachon (candlefish). The most important trade good on the coast. Preservative, condiment, and currency.

production.notes: Only available during spring eulachon runs. Extremely valuable.

resources.name: Berries
resources.description: Gathered berries — salmonberries, huckleberries, blueberries. Supplemental food and medicine ingredient.

resources.name: Shellfish
resources.description: Clams, mussels, and other shellfish from tidal areas. Reliable low-effort food source. Does not preserve well.

resources.name: Cedar Logs
resources.description: Large red cedar logs. The supreme building material — canoes, longhouses, poles. Increasingly scarce in later eras.

production.notes: Harvesting requires labor + access to old-growth cedar stands. Availability decreases each era.

resources.name: Cedar Bark
resources.description: Stripped cedar bark for weaving, rope-making, and clothing. Harvested without killing the tree.

production.notes: Best harvested in spring when bark peels easily.

resources.name: Woven Blankets
resources.description: Woven cedar bark or mountain goat wool blankets. Important trade goods, potlatch gifts, and ceremonial items.

resources.name: Carved Objects
resources.description: Carved cedar boxes, bowls, masks, and decorative items. High-value trade goods and prestige gifts.

resources.name: Copper
resources.description: A shield-shaped copper — the supreme prestige object. Named, valued, and traded at enormous cost. Breaking a copper at a potlatch is the ultimate display of wealth.

production.notes: Cannot be produced. Must be acquired through distant trade or as gifts from high-prestige allies. Extremely rare.
